response.original_title: >辰波要徳×JULIA ちょいM美々子さん
response.overview: Based on Yotoku Tatsunami's popular manga about a Married Woman! Mimiko, a beautiful busty Housewife, lives apart from her husband due to a sexless marriage. While killing time at a rental video store where she works part-time, she discovers her hidden lustful desires through an encounter with a man named Tadayuki. Her hidden slightly masochistic tendencies awaken... She is pursued by aggressive men and subjected to various M-style encounters
response.tagline: A sexless marriage leads a busty Housewife down a path of hidden desires.
response.title: Tatsunami Yotoku and JULIA, The Slightly-Masochistic Mimiko
